workstreams.name: QuickMed AOB recoveries
workstreams.description: Assignment-of-benefits recovery files, evidence packets, patient outreach, and insurer-paid funds follow-up.

workstreams.name: Insurer reimbursement
workstreams.description: Claims-data work, payment trails, reimbursement disputes, and payer follow-up.

workstreams.name: Counsel / litigation
workstreams.description: Counsel requests, litigation follow-up, limitations analysis, strategy notes, and issue lists.

workstreams.name: Signal / Flow Health
workstreams.description: Signal Diagnostics and Flow Health matters requiring separate entity tracking and follow-up.

workstreams.name: Software build
workstreams.description: Codex-ready specs, build queue, product ideas, local tools, and shipped software notes.

workstreams.name: Admin / operations
workstreams.description: Internal operating tasks, process cleanup, records, and company administration.

workstreams.name: Business development
workstreams.description: Opportunity tracking, partner follow-up, and relationship-building work.

matters.name: AOB recovery file intake template
matters.summary: Template matter for tracking AOB recovery files. Patient balance remains $0; dispute concerns insurer-paid funds allegedly retained despite AOB language.
matters.nextAction: Fill evidence checklist for first active files.
matters.blockedReason: Waiting on initial claim/check data imports.

tasks.title: Build first active AOB evidence packet
tasks.description: Use the evidence-gap list as the packet checklist. Keep patient balance language precise.

tasks.title: Confirm limitations date fields for recovery files
tasks.description: Separate service, billing, check issue, receipt, cashing/deposit, discovery, outreach, and filing dates.
tasks.blockedReason: Need counsel review of preferred date taxonomy.

notes.title: AOB framing guardrail
notes.body: For QuickMed AOB matters, do not imply ordinary patient medical debt. The working position is patient balance remains $0; the dispute concerns insurer-paid funds allegedly issued to and retained by the patient despite assignment-of-benefits language.

evidenceGaps.label: AOB / intake proof and timestamp
evidenceGaps.description: Attach intake proof showing assignment language and timing.
evidenceGaps.nextAction: Locate intake packet and timestamp export.

evidenceGaps.label: Check issue and cashing dates
evidenceGaps.description: Keep check issue, receipt, and deposit/cashing dates separate for limitations analysis.
evidenceGaps.nextAction: Request payer ledger or portal screenshot.

evidenceGaps.label: Outreach history
evidenceGaps.description: Calls, emails, letters, and any response history.

drafts.title: Codex build brief: evidence packet generator
drafts.body: Build a local tool that takes a matter, renders an evidence checklist, and exports a packet summary with missing/requested/received evidence grouped by source.

drafts.title: Counsel email: limitations date taxonomy
drafts.body: Draft request for counsel to confirm which dates should be captured and how to preserve issue-specific limitations analysis across QuickMed AOB recovery files.
